title: Visible Block Entities
description: Makes block entities render everywhere inside your render distance
body:
# What This Mod Does
**Visible Block Entities** makes block entities viewable anywhere inside the set render distance. This is especially useful for bases that make heavy use of banners or other block entities in their design. 
## How does it work?
Visible Block Entities overrides the hard-coded 64 block rendering limit for block entities. Instead it uses the set render distance to calculate the rendering limit to make it practically unnoticeable.

- Performance drops _may_ occur if there is too many block entities in the set render distance. **This can simply be fixed by lowering the set render distance or installing a performance enhancing mod.**
- Due to how this mod overwrites base Minecraft code, there is always a possibility this can cause incompatibilities with another mod. **At this time, there is no known incompatibilities with any other mod.**
